criteria_results.criterion: src/middleware.ts が Authorization: Bearer ヘッダーによる認証をサポート（Cookie OR Bearer）
criteria_results.evidence: middleware.ts lines 119-130: Bearer token check with verifyTokenEdge(). Cookie checked first (line 114-117), Bearer as fallback. Test: middleware-bearer.test.ts (6 scenarios)

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate ls が worktree 一覧を3フォーマットで出力（table/json/quiet）
criteria_results.evidence: ls.ts: formatTable() (line 28), JSON via JSON.stringify (line 58), quiet via map(wt=>wt.id).join('\n') (line 61). Test: ls.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate ls --quiet が1行1IDの改行区切りで出力
criteria_results.evidence: ls.ts line 61: worktrees.map(wt => wt.id).join('\n'). Test: ls.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate send がメッセージ送信 + Auto-Yes 有効化できる
criteria_results.evidence: send.ts lines 49-73: --auto-yes sends auto-yes API first, then send API. Test: send.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate send --auto-yes --agent 指定時に auto-yes API と send API の両方に同じ cliToolId が送信される
criteria_results.evidence: send.ts line 64-65: autoYesBody.cliToolId = options.agent; line 77-78: sendBody.cliToolId = options.agent. Same agent value used for both. Test: send.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate wait がブロッキング待機し、完了/プロンプト/タイムアウトを正しい終了コードで返す
criteria_results.evidence: wait.ts: WaitExitCode.SUCCESS=0 (line 91), PROMPT_DETECTED=10 (line 85), TIMEOUT=124 (line 41). pollWorktree() implements blocking loop. Test: wait.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate wait の正常完了判定が isRunning===false && isPromptWaiting===false
criteria_results.evidence: wait.ts line 89: if (!data.isRunning && !data.isPromptWaiting) return SUCCESS. Test: wait.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate wait のプロンプト検出時、{ worktreeId, cliToolId } & PromptData のJSONをstdoutに出力
criteria_results.evidence: wait.ts lines 76-85: WaitPromptOutput with worktreeId, cliToolId, type, question, options, status. Line 137: console.log(JSON.stringify(result.output)). Test: wait.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate wait --on-prompt human がプロンプト検出後もブロック継続
criteria_results.evidence: wait.ts lines 68-72: if (options.onPrompt === 'human') continues polling loop. Test: wait.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate respond がプロンプトに応答できる（yes/no, 番号選択, テキスト）
criteria_results.evidence: respond.ts: accepts <answer> argument, sends via prompt-response API (line 53-56). Supports any string input. Test: respond.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate respond --agent でエージェント種別を指定できる
criteria_results.evidence: respond.ts line 49-51: body.cliTool = options.agent when --agent provided. Test: respond.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate capture が最新出力を取得できる
criteria_results.evidence: capture.ts: GET /api/worktrees/{id}/current-output, outputs data.content (line 59). Test: capture.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate capture --json が定義済みフィールド（fullOutput除外）でJSON出力
criteria_results.evidence: capture.ts line 18-22: formatJson() destructures { fullOutput, ...rest } and outputs rest. Test: capture.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate capture --agent で特定エージェントの出力を取得できる
criteria_results.evidence: capture.ts lines 48-51: appends ?cliTool=agent query parameter. Test: capture.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate auto-yes が個別に Auto-Yes を制御できる（--stop-pattern 対応含む）
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes.ts: --enable/--disable, --duration, --stop-pattern options. Lines 62-78: builds body with enabled, duration, stopPattern. Test: auto-yes.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: commandmate auto-yes --agent でエージェント種別を指定できる
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes.ts lines 80-82: body.cliToolId = options.agent. Test: auto-yes.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: 全コマンドが --json / --quiet フォーマットに対応
criteria_results.evidence: ls: --json, --quiet options. capture: --json option. send/wait/respond/auto-yes: use stderr for status, stdout for data (JSON output for wait prompt). All commands follow consistent output pattern.

criteria_results.criterion: サーバー未起動時に適切なエラーメッセージを表示
criteria_results.evidence: api-client.ts lines 105-109: ECONNREFUSED maps to 'Server is not running. Start it with: commandmate start'. Test: api-client.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: 認証有効サーバーに対して --token または CM_AUTH_TOKEN で認証できる
criteria_results.evidence: api-client.ts resolveAuthToken() (lines 35-44): --token takes priority, falls back to CM_AUTH_TOKEN env var. ApiClient sets Authorization: Bearer header (line 170). Test: api-client.test.ts

criteria_results.criterion: 既存の commandmate start / stop / status と共存
criteria_results.evidence: cli/index.ts: start/stop/status commands (lines 47-108) unchanged. New commands added via addCommand() (lines 116-121). CLI --help output confirms all commands coexist.

criteria_results.criterion: npm run build:cli でビルドでき、node bin/commandmate.js で実行可能
criteria_results.evidence: build:cli succeeded (tsc --project tsconfig.cli.json). node bin/commandmate.js --help shows all commands including ls, send, wait, respond, capture, auto-yes.

criteria_results.criterion: 単体テスト（vitest）で主要パスをカバー
criteria_results.evidence: 10 Issue #518 test files, 91 tests all passing: middleware-bearer.test.ts, ls.test.ts, send.test.ts, wait.test.ts, respond.test.ts, capture.test.ts, auto-yes.test.ts, api-client.test.ts, duration-constants.test.ts, cross-validation.test.ts

test_cases.scenario: middleware: Cookie認証成功、Bearer認証成功、Cookie+Bearer両方ありでCookie優先、無効Cookie+有効BearerでBearer成功、認証情報なしでリダイレクト、無効Bearerのみで401 JSON
test_cases.evidence: middleware-bearer.test.ts: 6 scenarios verified in unit tests

test_cases.scenario: ls: テーブル出力、JSON出力、quiet出力、--branch前方一致フィルタ
test_cases.evidence: ls.test.ts: all format outputs and branch filter tested

test_cases.scenario: send: メッセージ送信、--auto-yes付き送信、--agent指定、--duration指定（1h/3h/8h）、--stop-pattern指定
test_cases.evidence: send.test.ts: message send, auto-yes+agent, duration, stop-pattern tested

test_cases.scenario: wait: 正常完了（exit 0）、プロンプト検出（exit 10 + JSON出力）、タイムアウト（exit 124）、--on-prompt human、複数ID同時待機
test_cases.evidence: wait.test.ts: all exit codes, prompt output, human mode, multi-ID tested

test_cases.scenario: respond: yes/no応答、番号選択、テキスト入力、--agent指定
test_cases.evidence: respond.test.ts: various answer types and agent option tested

test_cases.scenario: capture: テキスト出力、JSON出力（fullOutput除外）、--agent指定
test_cases.evidence: capture.test.ts: text/JSON output and agent query param tested

test_cases.scenario: 共通: --token認証、CM_AUTH_TOKEN認証、サーバー未起動時エラー、worktree ID不正時エラー
test_cases.evidence: api-client.test.ts: token resolution, ECONNREFUSED handling, ID validation tested

test_cases.scenario: ビルド: npm run build:cli成功、型チェック成功、lint成功
test_cases.evidence: tsc --noEmit: clean, npm run lint: no errors, npm run build:cli: success

message: All 22 acceptance criteria verified. 10 test files with 91 tests all passing. Quality checks (tsc, lint, test:unit, build:cli) all clean.
